name: Creator Wallet Tracker
description: Tracks deployer and creator wallets for new launches, sells, transfers, liquidity actions, and suspicious clusters.
degenPitch: Watch the creator wallet before the chart starts screaming.
whatItDoes: Tracks creator wallets and deployer actions.
Flags sells, transfers, liquidity actions, and clusters.
cursorPrompt: Build a Creator Wallet Tracker using DNA x402. Track public deployer and creator wallets for launches, sells, transfers, liquidity actions, and suspicious clusters. Gate premium alerts with receipts.
